news.t: Davis ETFs to Transfer Exchange Listing of All Four Funds to CBOE Global Markets, Inc.

holdings.infoBox: DWLD is an equity ETF with a total of 38 individual holdings. The top holdings are Samsung Electronics stock at 5.57%, Full Truck Alliance at 5.49%, Trip.com Group Ltd ADR at 4.75%, Devon Energy at 4.61%, and Viatris at 4.31%.

overview.description: The Davis Select Worldwide ETF (DWLD) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund is an actively-managed portfolio of global equities. The fund seeks long-term capital growth. DWLD was launched on Jan 11, 2017 and is issued by Davis.

data.title: Davis ETFs to Transfer Exchange Listing of All Four Funds to CBOE Global Markets, Inc.
data.text: NEW YORK--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Davis ETFs are actively managed ETFs with combined assets of over $1.2 billion and were launched in 2017. Davis Selected Advisers, L.P. announced today plans to transfer the...
